title: Synthetic project brief
summary: A public-safe brief for a fictional document automation project.

title: Document Automation Project
summary: A synthetic managed project used to demonstrate GrowGraph project-control loops.

title: Maintain approved graph baseline
summary: Keep project state canonical, reviewable and protected from unapproved updates.

title: Generate human projection
summary: Generate a readable project projection from canonical graph state for human review.

title: Generated human projection
summary: A generated readable view of the synthetic project graph; it is review input, not canonical truth.

title: Run semantic review
summary: Compare the human projection with the canonical graph and identify meaningful gaps.

title: Semantic review notes
summary: Synthetic notes identifying one meaningful gap: an approval gate must be explicit before baseline update.

title: Graph sync proposal
summary: Propose a canonical graph update based on reviewed evidence instead of mutating the graph directly.

title: Collect evidence pack
summary: Collect projection, review notes, proposed update and expected validation before approval.

title: Graph sync evidence pack
summary: Synthetic evidence pack linking the generated projection, semantic review and proposed graph update.

title: Coordinator approval gate
summary: A coordinator must approve the graph sync proposal before canonical state changes.

title: Approved canonical update
summary: The proposed graph update is accepted only after evidence and gate review are complete.

title: Unapproved canonical drift
summary: Generated documents or implementation work may introduce unapproved facts if the approval gate is skipped.
